Title: Extends provisions of law relating to certain costs of the department of motor vehicles
Summary: Extends provisions of law relating to increasing certain motor vehicle transaction fees and relating to certain costs of the department of motor vehicles.
LawCode: Amd Part U §13, Chap 62 of 2003; amd Part B §2, Chap 84 of 2002
ActClause: AN ACT to amend part U1 of chapter 62 of the laws of 2003, amending the vehicle and traffic law and other laws relating to increasing certain motor vehicle transaction fees, in relation to the effectiveness thereof; to amend part B of chapter 84 of the laws of 2002, amending the state finance law relating to the costs of the department of motor vehicles, in relation to the effectiveness thereof; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
